news.title:

news.title:
Hero MotoCorp's rating downgraded to Hold amid flat quarterly performance.
Strong fundamentals persist, but mixed technicals and financial trends drive cautious outlook.

news.title:
Hero MotoCorp completes acquisition of 2,68,219 Series E shares in Euler Motors for Rs. 210 crore.
Post-acquisition, Hero MotoCorp holds a 36.67% stake in Euler Motors on a fully diluted basis.
news.summary:
Hero MotoCorp completes acquisition of 2,68,219 Series E shares in Euler Motors for Rs. 210 crore.
Post-acquisition, Hero MotoCorp holds a 36.67% stake in Euler Motors on a fully diluted basis.

news.title:
Hero MotoCorp's March sales rose 8.8% YoY to 5.98 lakh units.
Scooter sales grew 53.2%, motorcycle sales up 5.1%, and exports rose 15.6% YoY.
news.summary:
Hero MotoCorp's March sales rose 8.8% YoY to 5.98 lakh units.
Scooter sales grew 53.2%, motorcycle sales up 5.1%, and exports rose 15.6% YoY.

news.title:
Hero MotoCorp's Q4 dispatches surged 24%, signaling robust growth.
The company projects FY26 volumes to rise 10% to 6.5M units.
news.summary:
Hero MotoCorp's Q4 dispatches surged 24%, signaling robust growth.
The company projects FY26 volumes to rise 10% to 6.5M units.

news.title:
SEBI has approved IPOs for 10 firms, including Pride Hotels, Hero FinCorp, and Kent RO Systems, spanning diverse sectors.
Proceeds aim to fund expansion, debt repayment, and strategic initiatives, offering investors sectoral growth opportunities.

news.title:
Hero MotoCorp shows bullish momentum on weekly charts with 61.8% Fibonacci support.
Higher lows indicate potential Elliott Wave impulse for Hero MotoCorp.

news.title:
Hero MotoCorp-backed Euler Motors raises ₹437.5 crore in Series E funding led by Lightrock.
Total ₹687.5 crore raised includes ₹250 crore debt funding from BlackSoil, Trifecta, InnoVen, Alteria Capital.
news.summary:
Hero MotoCorp-backed Euler Motors raises ₹437.5 crore in Series E funding led by Lightrock.
Total ₹687.5 crore raised includes ₹250 crore debt funding from BlackSoil, Trifecta, InnoVen, Alteria Capital.

news.title:
CLSA cuts target prices for major auto stocks like Tata Motors, M&M, Hero MotoCorp, citing crude price risks.
Preferred picks include M&M, Bajaj Auto, TVS, Ashok Leyland due to stronger execution amid earnings risks.
news.summary:
CLSA cuts target prices for major auto stocks like Tata Motors, M&M, Hero MotoCorp, citing crude price risks.
Preferred picks include M&M, Bajaj Auto, TVS, Ashok Leyland due to stronger execution amid earnings risks.

news.title:
Hero MotoCorp discloses under SEBI regulation that interim dividend for FY 2025-26 is withheld for shareholders with incomplete KYC.
SEBI mandates electronic dividend payment; shareholders urged to update KYC/bank details to receive withheld dividends.
news.summary:
Hero MotoCorp discloses under SEBI regulation that interim dividend for FY 2025-26 is withheld for shareholders with incomplete KYC.

news.title:
Hero MotoCorp's tax demand reduced from ₹177.96 Cr to ₹27 Cr.
Company plans to appeal for remaining tax and potential refunds.
news.summary:
Hero MotoCorp's tax demand reduced from ₹177.96 Cr to ₹27 Cr.

news.title:

Hero MotoCorp leads with 45% growth; Suzuki Motorcycle volumes rise 38%, Royal Enfield expands capacity.

EV expansion planned by FY'27; new products and brand strategy targeting growth, market share gains except premium segment in Q3.
